name_en: Top-tier original factory with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original factory with full packaging
4-Compartment Grey Suede with Letter Strap Rock Grey in stock!!️
The 4-Compartment Lady suede that everyone has been longing for is finally here❤️. This size is between the 3- and 5-Compartment, practical and exquisite, and suede is much more durable than lambskin😌. It stands out when worn, can be elegant or casual, and is the best choice for various looks👏🏻
size:20cm
